import unreal
abp='/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
unreal.load_asset(abp)
seq=None
for o in unreal.ObjectIterator():
    try:
        cls=o.get_class().get_name()
    except Exception:
        continue
    if cls=='AnimGraphNode_SequencePlayer' and 'ABP_Bodycam' in o.get_path_name() and 'Walk' in o.get_outer().get_name():
        seq=o
        print('Found:', o.get_path_name())
if seq:
    props = seq.get_editor_property('show_pin_for_properties')
    out=[]
    for p in props:
        nm=str(p.get_editor_property('property_name'))
        shown=p.get_editor_property('show_pin')
        if nm=='PlayRate':
            p.set_editor_property('show_pin', True)
        out.append((nm, shown))
    seq.set_editor_property('show_pin_for_properties', props)
    print('PROPS:', out)
    ok = unreal.BlueprintService.refresh_node(abp,'Walk','FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19')
    print('refresh:', ok)
    pins = unreal.BlueprintService.get_node_pins(abp,'Walk','FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19')
    print('PINS NOW:', pins)
